title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
99acres has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
